rationale: Educ. Code §45.153 governs board of directors composition and governance of an authority; it is unrelated to residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 45.153. BOARD OF DIRECTORS. (a) An authority is governed by a board of directors consisting of seven members.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns board governance, not property tax exemptions.
